# TTMLLIB — The Open TTML Lyrics Library
Developed by Jetomit-Bio (https://github.com/Jetomit-Bio)

TTMLLIB is a high-performance open-source Next.js application and API built to parse, cache, store, and display synchronized lyrics in TTML (Timed Text Markup Language) and LRC formats.

## Key Project Details & Links
- Main Website: https://ttmllib.xyz (or local deployment)
- Plain Text Database Dump (For AI Crawlers/LLMs): https://ttmllib.xyz/txt
- Author GitHub: https://github.com/Jetomit-Bio
- Donations: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/JetomitBio
- Official Distributor: SudoAPP (https://sudoapp.pro)

## Architecture & Tech Stack
- Frontend/Backend: Next.js (App Router, Server Actions, API routes)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- Database: MySQL
- External Fallback: LRCLIB (https://lrclib.net) for caching uncached lyrics on-the-fly

## Database Schema (MySQL)
To run a local instance or set up the database, execute:

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tracks` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `artist` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `album` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  `duration` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  `type` ENUM('Plain', 'Synced') NOT NULL,
  `lyrics` TEXT NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `distributor` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  `duration_seconds` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `youtube_id` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  `lyrics_ttml` TEXT NULL,
  `is_verified` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_keys` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `api_key` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `owner` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
```

## API Reference

### 1. Get Lyrics (with Fallback to LRCLIB)
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/get`
- **Query Parameters:**
  - `track_name` (required, string)
  - `artist_name` (required, string)
  - `album_name` (required, string)
  - `duration` (required, integer, in seconds)
- **Response Format:**
  ```json
  {
    "id": 1,
    "trackName": "Song Title",
    "artistName": "Artist Name",
    "albumName": "Album Name",
    "duration": 222,
    "instrumental": false,
    "plainLyrics": "Plain text...",
    "syncedLyrics": "[00:10.50] Synced...",
    "lyricsTtml": "<tt>...</tt>",
    "isVerified": true,
    "distributor": "SudoAPP"
  }
  ```

### 2. Get Cached Lyrics (No External Request)
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/get-cached`
- **Query Parameters:** Same as `/api/get`
- **Response Format:** Same as `/api/get`

### 3. Get Lyrics by Database ID
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/get/[id]`
- **Response Format:** Same as `/api/get`

### 4. Search Tracks
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/search`
- **Query Parameters:**
  - `q` (string, fulltext query across title, artist, and album)
  - `track_name` (string, title filter)
  - `artist_name` (optional, string, artist filter)
  - `album_name` (optional, string, album filter)
  - `verified` (optional, string/boolean): Filter by verified status (`1`/`true` or `0`/`false`)
  - `distributor` (optional, string): Filter by distributor name (case-insensitive)

### 5. Ingest / Upload Track (Authorized)
- **Endpoint:** `POST /api/upload`
- **Headers:**
  - `x-api-key`: Ingestion API Key (required)
- **JSON Body:**
  ```json
  {
    "distributor": "SudoAPP",
    "title": "Song Title",
    "artist": "Artist Name",
    "album": "Album Name",
    "duration_seconds": 222,
    "youtube_id": "rI1lFh5xZM8",
    "lyrics_plain": "Plain text lyrics...",
    "lyrics_ttml": "<tt>...</tt>"
  }
  ```
